description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and fixed tricycle landing gear. The fuselage is streamlined and painted primarily white, with blue and yellow accent stripes along the tail and fuselage. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and features a clear, enclosed canopy with visible windows. The wings are straight and mounted above the fuselage, providing good visibility below and to the sides. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer, both with clean, angular lines. The landing gear includes two main wheels and a nose wheel, all fixed and exposed, suitable for paved or semi-prepared surfaces.
description: A small, high-wing, single-engine airplane with a white body, blue and yellow stripes, and fixed tricycle landing gear. The cockpit is forward and enclosed, with a conventional tail and streamlined design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-mounted wing, fixed tricycle landing gear, and blue/yellow stripes on the tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight wing span, tail assembly, and the symmetry of the landing gear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the cockpit, wing, and tail stripes.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the nose, cockpit windows, and the full width of the high-mounted wing.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single piston engine mounted at the nose.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely configured for two seats.
